packs.name: Builders Pack
packs.description: Want to become a master builder? Start with this bundle of six Minecraft packs: Plastic Texture Pack, Candy Texture Pack, Pattern Texture Pack, Cartoon Texture Pack, Greek Mythology Mash-Up Pack, and Chinese Mythology Mash-Up Pack.

bundlePacks.name: Minecraft Plastic Texture Pack
bundlePacks.description: Make your worlds simple, colorful, and vibrant with bright plastic-themed textures for blocks, items, entities, and the UI.

bundlePacks.name: Minecraft Candy Texture Pack
bundlePacks.description: Indulge your sweet tooth with sugar-coated textures for blocks, items, entities, and the UI.

bundlePacks.name: Minecraft: Pattern Texture Pack
bundlePacks.description: Decorate your world with bright patterns, knitted animals, and themed textures for blocks, items, entities, and the UI.

bundlePacks.name: Minecraft Greek Mythology Mash-Up
bundlePacks.description: Build a pantheon fit for the gods, trap the Minotaur in an elaborate maze, and set sail across the sea in this mythology-themed mash-up.

bundlePacks.name: Minecraft Cartoon Texture Pack
bundlePacks.description: Googly eyes, goofy grins, and a full toon-style makeover for blocks, items, entities, and the UI.

bundlePacks.name: Minecraft Chinese Mythology Mash-Up
bundlePacks.description: Journey through epic terrain and find enlightenment in a land of dragons inspired by the myths and legends of China.
